title: Complex Creamy Vietnamese Shrimp Bun Cha
description: A spicy and aerated Vietnamese dish featuring shrimp paste and chocolate, served in a cazuela, this bun cha is an anti-inflammatory friendly show stopper.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
In a small saucepan, melt the dark chocolate over low heat, stirring constantly.
In a large bowl, whisk together the shrimp paste, fish sauce, lime juice, and chili flakes.
Add the cooked noodles to the bowl and toss to combine with the shrimp paste mixture.
If using, slice the grilled pork into thin strips and add to the noodles.
If using, add the pickled carrots to the noodles and toss to combine.
Stir in the melted chocolate until well combined.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a large cazuela or serving dish.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
Offer additional fish sauce, lime juice, and chili flakes on the side for added flavor.
